# IMeTech Engineering

> Complete product development from idea to working prototype. One engineer, every discipline.

IMeTech Engineering is a freelance engineering firm founded by Ivo Mengerink, based in Aalten, Achterhoek, Gelderland, the Netherlands. We offer full-stack product development: mechanical design (SolidWorks, CSWP certified), electronics and PCB design, embedded software (C++, Python, PLC), data science and machine learning, and end-to-end product development from concept through prototype to production.

## Services

- Software Development: https://imetech.nl/diensten/softwareontwikkeling.html
- Electronics & PCB Design: https://imetech.nl/diensten/elektronica-pcb-ontwerp.html
- Mechanical Design & CAD: https://imetech.nl/diensten/mechanica-cad-tekeningen.html
- Data Science & Machine Learning: https://imetech.nl/diensten/data-science-machine-learning.html
- Product Development: https://imetech.nl/diensten/productontwikkeling.html

## Selected Projects

- CarryVision Plant Camera System (ESP32-CAM, Raspberry Pi, IoT): https://imetech.nl/projecten/carryvision-plantcamerasysteem.html
- Rollator Control Unit for Parkinson's patients (ESP32-C3, PCB, embedded): https://imetech.nl/projecten/besturing-rollator.html
- SCD30 Address Board PCB (Modbus RTU, RS-485, CO2 sensors): https://imetech.nl/projecten/adresprint-scd30-pcb.html
- Air Quality Control Panels (PLC, sensors, web dashboard): https://imetech.nl/projecten/besturingskasten.html
- Self-Balancing Cube (robotics, control engineering, flywheels): https://imetech.nl/projecten/zelfbalancerende-kubus.html
- 6-DOF SpaceMouse (3D input device, embedded): https://imetech.nl/projecten/6-dof-spacemouse.html
- Sketch to Render (SolidWorks, 3D CAD, photorealistic rendering): https://imetech.nl/projecten/schets-tot-render.html
- All projects: https://imetech.nl/projecten/
